name: Myths Of Orion: Books of Power
short_description: Use your sharp eye and brave heart to stop a dark wizard in Myths of Orion — a richly illustrated Hidden Object Puzzle Adventure.
detailed_description:
Search detailed scenes, collect magical items, solve clever puzzles and unravel the Realm’s mysteries as Meredith, the brave enchantress’s daughter.

One day the mighty enchantress Salina gathered all of her strength and courage and stole the Books from the Wizard. Under the cover of a night, she took the Books and her child, baby Meredith, and ran far, far away to the north - to the very edge of the world.
And so, the years and decades passed by... until one day...

🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Dozens of locations & mini-games – mystery lurks from every dark corner.

🗺️ Map & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Full voiceovers & HD visuals – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge: Casual, Adventure, and Challenging difficulty modes. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

  • TRACK down the missing Books of Power and stop the evil

  • EXPLORE over 70 stunning locations

  • INVESTIGATE kingdoms of Elves, Humans and Orcs

  • USE the magic flowing through your veins

  • SOLVE dozens of brain-teasing mini-games

  • SEARCH for clues and FIND HIDDEN OBJECTS

  • MEET unforgettable characters on your journey

  • READ the Diary as you DISCOVER new worlds

  • EARN achievements and COLLECT special items

  • ENJOY beautiful HD graphics and full motion videos

  • 4 DIFFICULTY MODES: custom, novice, adventure, challenge

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
